hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && npx eslint "$f" --max-warnings=0 2>&1 || true; }
git -C "$PWD" status --short 2>/dev/null | head -10 | { lines=$(cat); [ -n "$lines" ] && echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Uncommitted changes:\\n$lines\"}" || true; }
